RAID LOG — Healthcare Integration, Clinic A Pilot
Prepared by: M. Okafor (PC) | Week of 2026-04-15

RISKS
R1 | Vendor API v2 deprecation
    Owner: J. Patel (Lead Eng, primary) / D. Huang (backup, while J. on leave)
    Mitigation: Monitor closely. Address as needed.

R2 | Scope creep — additional endpoints
    Owner: K. Bell (Product Owner)
    Mitigation: Manage stakeholder expectations and escalate if necessary.

R3 | Engineer on paternity leave
    Owner: L. Davies (Eng Manager)
    Mitigation: Plan accordingly.

R4 | Premature clinic expansion
    Owner: G. Mensah (Steering Lead)
    Mitigation: Communicate concerns and align on priorities.

ISSUES
I1 | HL7 lab feed instability
    Owner: R. Silva (IT Ops)
    Action: Investigate.

I2 | Training attendance below target
    Owner: T. Njoku (Training Lead)
    Action: Follow up with stakeholders.

ASSUMPTIONS
A1 | Stakeholder alignment will hold
    Owner: M. Okafor
    Validation: Regular communication.

DEPENDENCIES
D1 | Vendor delivery
    Owner: C. Morales (Vendor SM)
    Mitigation: Maintain regular touchpoints.

D2 | Internal IT cutover
    Owner: R. Silva (IT Ops)
    Mitigation: Coordinate as scheduled.
